# Architect Response Templates

## Template A: Artifact Selection

1. Selected artifact type.
2. Why this artifact fits the request.
3. Required input fields.
4. Source template used.

## Template B: Draft Guidance

1. Section-by-section structure.
2. Key content to provide per section.
3. Common mistakes to avoid.
4. Source template used.

## Template C: Multi-Step Plan

1. Ordered phases.
2. Artifact produced per phase.
3. Review checkpoints.
4. Next action.
